4, section 30.1. It is not acceptable for 
HHAs to wait until the end of a 60-day certification period to obtain a completed 
certification/recertification. 

30.5.1.1 – Face-to-Face Encounter 
(Rev. 10438, Issued: 11-06-20, Effective: 03-01-20, Implementation: 01- 11-21) 

1. Allowed Provider Types 

As part of the certification of patient eligibility for the Medicare home health benefit, a 
face-to-face encounter with the patient must be performed by the certifying physician or 
allowed
